subject: [PATCH v3 02/11] mm: add PMD swap entry splitting support

2026-07-03.patch_summary: This patch adds support for splitting a PMD swap entry into 512 PTE swap entries in the Linux kernel's memory management (mm) subsystem. This is done by adding a new branch to the __split_huge_pmd_locked() function that handles PMD swap entries differently than migration splits. The patch preserves flags such as soft_dirty, uffd_wp, and exclusive when splitting the PMD swap entry into PTEs. The change also includes checks to prevent potential issues with uninitialized variables in the swap branch.
